hintDisplay: Sujeto: Ellos / Verbo: Vestir (negación en presente) / Complemento: Para la lluvia / Tiempo: Durante el verano
spanishSentence: Ellos no se visten para la lluvia durante el verano.
correctSentence: They don't dress for rain during summer.

hints: Complemento: cuando llega el clima frío

correctSentence: We bundle up when cold weather arrives.

hints: Complemento: Con una intensidad que nunca había visto antes

correctSentence: It is pouring down with an intensity I have never seen before.

correctSentence: The meteorologist will predict an unexpected storm tomorrow.

correctSentence: I don't wear the coat when the weather is warm.

correctSentence: We don't stay inside during an awful storm.

correctSentence: The farmer is not watering the crops because the rain is not falling.

correctSentence: They prepare for an unexpected storm.
